name: Conchiglie Tutto Giardino
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Light Cream (or half and half)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté carrots, onions, parsley, basil, and garlic for about 15 minutes over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped red onion and continue cooking until softened, about 5 more minutes.
3. Stir in tomatoes, zucchini, bell pepper, white wine, salt, pepper, and sugar. Simmer uncovered for 15 minutes.
4. In a separate saucepan, melt 1 tablespoon butter over low heat. Gradually whisk in flour to form a roux, cooking until smooth.
5. Slowly whisk in heated cream, then add tomato paste, stirring until the mixture is well combined.
6. Stir the tomato and cream mixture into the vegetables, adding Parmesan cheese just before serving.
7. Toss the cooked pasta with the vegetable sauce, ensuring even coating. Serve immediately.
